title: SQL: View creation using a function....
poc: create table t1(id int, name varchar(1024), age int);
create table t2(id int, age int);
create view v1 as select * from t1 where id = f(1);
key_bug_features: View creation using a function in SQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(1024) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2(id INT PRIMARY KEY, age INT DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t1(id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25);
INSERT INTO t2(id, age) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 40);
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM t2);
